replies.msg:
睇黎都係入M2C
難得又有靚盤

mustang GT, handling is pretty shit, only good for wide straight roads imo

TTRS, fastest of all, girls love audi these days, no infotainment screen, best looking outside, so so interior

CLA45, better wait for new CLA45s next year, original CLA45 4matic system is shit, nice interior though

M2 competition, great handling even AT, 6 cynlinders, future classic, M3/4 bargain, so so interior, back seats more comfy than expected

Cayman GTS, go for NA 6 cynlinders, best handling, PDK, may not keep value though

I would choose TTRS v M2c v Cayman GTS.

actually i would see it as

TTRS v CLA45s (2020), front engine AWD, but very likely audi quattro is better than AMG 4matic+, but 45s has better interior and more practical

M2c v Cayman GTS, twin turbo vs NA 6 cylinders, they have comparable handling, BUT M2c is quite heavy so not so good power to weight ratio, you need good driving skills to handle M2c well

all in all, its a lot of car per price point.

M2c is arguably the best M car in ~20 years.
